events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary Mick Jagger turns 83 today! Still strutting, still singing, still proving that rock and roll keeps you forever young.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the US with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The channel changed music forever, even if the first song was a bit ironic.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago. That iconic debut album cemented their place in Britpop history and delivered anthems that still resonate.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music still reigns supreme.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years since the tragic passing of Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and enduring legacy continue to influence music and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His guitar work remains as electrifying as ever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released 57 years ago. A true masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders frontwoman, still rocking and inspiring.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, former Oasis frontman, was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation, still bringing the swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's solo single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975 (album released in 1971).

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released 51 years ago. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly today as ever.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple announced the first generation iPod on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the original iPod. It wasn't just a gadget; it completely revolutionised how we listen to music.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007, martinis (shaken, not stirred), and unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon was born on this day in 1940; he would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedian and actor John Cleese was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their double album 'The Beatles' (commonly known as 'The White Album') on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles' groundbreaking 'White Album' was released 58 years ago today. A sprawling, diverse masterpiece that showed the Fab Four at their most experimental.
